Peeling_Int.Wiki: The strength of the peeling texture to display

Rust_Int.Wiki: The amount of rust to show on metal parts

CHG_1stlayer_Shininess.Wiki: Adjusts the shininess strength of the paint peeling

CHG_1stlayer_Metalness.Wiki: Adjusts the metallic strength of the paint peeling

CHG_3rdlayer_Shininess.Wiki: Adjusts the shininess strength of rust

CHG_3rdlayer_Metalness.Wiki: Adjusts the metallic strength of rust

Self.Wiki:
Defines the Weathering options for Armored Cores.

Row ID links the Preset to the icon texture in SB_Weathering.dds and SB_Weathering.layout

Row ID + 210801 links the Preset to the FMG name it uses in the menu.
